title: Optimized Mangrove Propagule Models
description: this resource pack optimizes the extremely unoptimized mangrove propagule models, improving performance in mangrove swamps.
body:
all models associated with mangrove propagules range from moderately to grossly unoptimized. this pack aims to fix all of these issues, while keeping the final model visually identical.
## list of changes
- starting with the worst offender, the hanging state for propagules. these models are [comically unoptimized](https://report.bugs.mojang.com/servicedesk/customer/portal/2/MC-262689), due to not removing faces that are impossible to actually see. ![the vanilla mangrove propagule's age 4 hanging true block model, showing that it has 60 faces despite over half of those being unrendered. the left side shows the faces of one of the cross parts.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b120dbdf722d88f9e703ea825bbaa9272c5a24f.png) ![the vanilla model, showing the vanilla texture, and the top and bottom cross elements being seperate.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcef4c96de027a6a63e3462beb866ef6667ecaaf.png) the hyperlinked bug report contains a fixed pack for these, but this pack goes further. this pack changes the texture so that all previously seperate elements are joined together. ![the modified texture, showing the elements' textures being joined together, so that they can be joined together as one element.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d8e81553a85478de413e335af106a42c0b685c8.png)
- the ground sapling form is alot more simple of an unoptimization. it uses two crosses instead of one, so that it can have the stem be in the middle (causing a mixel, which I am fine with but others may disagree). this pack fixes this by using the standard cross model, and using a 32x32 texture for the block instead. the item form is unaffected.![the modified ground sapling form of the mangrove propagule's model, showing the texture being 32x32 so that the stem can be in the middle.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1cc7b330673df811fe84b83876e76fb784520e2.png)
- the potted form is unoptimized because it's based on the vanilla flower pot, which is similarly extremely unoptimized. this pack uses an all new model (which uses the vanilla texture!) which has a much better face count. it also uses the 32x32 texture mentioned previously.
